reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+2 exceeds tokenList size; also incorrect logic if tokenList is empty]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Directly accessing index+1 and index+2 without bounds checking will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException if the token list is short or at the end.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead access (index + 1, index + 2) may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when near the end of the token list. Additionally, the condition logic incorrectly distinguishes between Decl, FuncDef, and MainFuncDef. It should check curToken directly and use safe peeking to determine if the current construct is a declaration.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is flawed: it assumes the next two tokens determine if we've reached main(), but doesn't account for empty token list or end of input, and may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException.
